title: My model booked 6,240 points in this recent fall.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Just wanted to share the recent trade my model executed:

* **Signal date:** 26/10/2025 close (GMT) / 27/10/2025 open
* **Exit date:** 30/10/2025 close (GMT)
* **Direction:** Short
* **Result:** Captured **+6,240 points** (Entry: $ 114,500→ Exit: $ 108,260)

This one was a big thumbs-up ✅, but of course not every trade is like this. On average, the model does about **5,000–5,500 points per month**.

https://preview.redd.it/ep7irq18tfyf1.png?width=1800&format=png&auto=webp&s=2f7247f498bb1702f295d61f2d0f97508a1c8594

For some context:

* Over the last 3 years, the model has **outperformed BTC spot** (no quarter has closed negative).
* This month alone, we’re up **+22,212 points**, while BTC is down by \~5,700 points ($114,000 - $108,300).

Not trying to hype this — just sharing transparent results. If anyone’s interested in how it works, feel free to drop questions here or direct message me. I’m also open to lending the model.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Dm me sir if you are really interested

comments.author: rr83019
comments.body:
This looks interesting, would like to learn more about it. 
Could you please share your approach, like any particular ML Model or Framework you went with?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I went with LSTM+Transforms and my pattern recognition model works really great...  
You can dm me if you are interested in it.

comments.body: Im interested. Im completely new to algo trading / ML
